---
title: "Florence Horatia Nelson Suckling"
---

## Florence Horatia Nelson Suckling

**Dates:** (1848-1923)

**Maiden name:** (Suckling)

### Description

Hon. Sec. of the Romsey [[other:265]Band of Mercy]

### Biography

She married (1876) her cousin Commander Thomas Suckling, R. N., of Highwood, Romsey, and was deeply involved in animal welfare charities.  They were descended from Nelson\'s maternal uncle.

### Letters

- Letter from March 30 1884

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
